cases.title: STEMI risk with prolonged pain
cases.query: Severe crushing chest pain radiating to left arm and jaw, diaphoresis, shortness of breath, nausea, near syncope
cases.context:
History: hypertension, dyslipidemia, diabetes, family history premature CAD.
Medications: irregular antiplatelet adherence, beta blocker, statin.
Recent notes: prior troponin rise and intermittent ST changes, exertional angina episodes, delayed cath-lab access.
Large context block: repeated telemetry concerns, unstable blood pressure trend, transfer delays, repeated chest pain escalation, oxygen fluctuation, nurse escalation logs.
Large context block: repeated telemetry concerns, unstable blood pressure trend, transfer delays, repeated chest pain escalation, oxygen fluctuation, nurse escalation logs.
Large context block: repeated telemetry concerns, unstable blood pressure trend, transfer delays, repeated chest pain escalation, oxygen fluctuation, nurse escalation logs.

cases.title: Post-op cardiac instability
cases.query: Chest tightness, cold sweats, tachycardia, breathlessness after surgery
cases.context:
History: recent abdominal surgery, anemia, CKD stage 2, hypertension.
Post-op trend: HR 130-145, episodic hypotension, concern for demand ischemia.
Large context: serial nurse notes of pain escalation and oxygen requirement increase.
Large context: serial nurse notes of pain escalation and oxygen requirement increase.
Large context: serial nurse notes of pain escalation and oxygen requirement increase.

cases.title: Acute asthma decompensation
cases.query: Cannot breathe, severe wheeze, speaking in single words, accessory muscle use
cases.context:
History: brittle asthma, prior ICU admission, poor inhaler adherence.
Current: SpO2 dips to 86% on room air, RR > 34, tachycardia.
Large context: repeated bronchodilator logs, delayed response to therapy, escalating respiratory fatigue.
Large context: repeated bronchodilator logs, delayed response to therapy, escalating respiratory fatigue.

cases.title: COPD exacerbation with hypoxia
cases.query: Severe shortness of breath, confusion, low oxygen and cyanosis
cases.context:
History: COPD Gold D, home oxygen use, frequent infections.
Current: productive cough, altered mental status, probable hypercapnia.
Large context: long chronic history notes, multiple prior admissions, repeated respiratory decline episodes.
Large context: long chronic history notes, multiple prior admissions, repeated respiratory decline episodes.

cases.title: Acute stroke window
cases.query: Sudden slurred speech, right facial droop, unilateral weakness, confusion
cases.context:
History: atrial fibrillation, prior TIA, anticoagulant noncompliance.
Timeline: last known well 45 minutes ago.
Large context: serial neuro checks showing progression of deficits and blood pressure instability.
Large context: serial neuro checks showing progression of deficits and blood pressure instability.

cases.title: Seizure with postictal compromise
cases.query: Generalized seizure followed by unresponsiveness and shallow breathing
cases.context:
History: epilepsy with missed doses, recent sleep deprivation.
Current: prolonged postictal state, concern for aspiration, low oxygen episodes.
Large context: nursing narrative with repeated airway repositioning and recurrent seizure concern.
Large context: nursing narrative with repeated airway repositioning and recurrent seizure concern.

cases.title: Polytrauma with hemorrhage
cases.query: Road traffic collision, active bleeding, hypotension, decreased consciousness
cases.context:
History: anticoagulant therapy, prior orthopedic surgery.
Current: suspected pelvic fracture, weak pulses, prolonged extrication.
Large context: repeated scene logs, blood loss estimates, transport delay risks, shock signs.
Large context: repeated scene logs, blood loss estimates, transport delay risks, shock signs.

Large context: repeated vitals and fluid response logs across transfer stages.

History: recurrent UTI, CKD stage 3, immunosuppressant treatment.

Large context: extensive sepsis bundle timeline, fluid response logs, antimicrobial timing notes.
Large context: extensive sepsis bundle timeline, fluid response logs, antimicrobial timing notes.
